qa_pair.question: Search for the patient named Ana Rivera, then count how many of her medications have an active status. How many are active?
Look up the patient Ana Rivera and find her penicillin allergy. What is its criticality?
For the patient Ana Rivera, how many conditions (problems/diagnoses) are recorded in total?
Find Ana Rivera's laboratory results and report her HbA1c value.
Which vaccine appears in Ana Rivera's immunization record?
What is the status of Ana Rivera's appointment?
Look up the patient Carlos Mendez. What medication is he actively taking?
Does the patient Carlos Mendez have any recorded allergies or intolerances? Answer yes or no.
Search practitioners for Iván Irizarry. What qualification does he hold?
Find Ana Rivera's vital signs and report the systolic value of her blood pressure reading.
